mission.title: inspektor-gadget: Some integration tests report events for other namespace
mission.description: Some integration tests report events for other namespace. Community-requested feature.

steps.title: Check current inspektor-gadget deployment
steps.description:
Verify your inspektor-gadget version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n inspektor-gadget -l app.kubernetes.io/name=inspektor-gadget
helm list -n inspektor-gadget 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working inspektor-gadget installation.

steps.title: Review inspektor-gadget configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant inspektor-gadget configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n inspektor-gadget -l app.kubernetes.io/name=inspektor-gadget
kubectl get configmap -n inspektor-gadget -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=inspektor-gadget
```
Some integration tests report events for other namespace than the one dedicated to this test.

steps.title: Apply the fix for Some integration tests report events for other namespace
steps.description:
The runcnotify package uses poll() to monitor the file descriptors (pidfd) of containers to detect when they are removed. A 1000ms timeout is used to make poll() return and update the list of file descriptors to monitor. This solution is not perfect since after a creation of a container, this
```yaml
2022-09-30T12:03:54.2901764Z     command.go:429: Stop command(StartCapabilitiesGadget)
2022-09-30T12:03:54.2902359Z     command.go:431: Command returned(StartCapabilitiesGadget):
2022-09-30T12:03:54.2902744Z         
2022-09-30T12:03:54.2904562Z         {"node":"arotestingcluster-kmcjg-worker-eastus2-nnb52","namespace":"test-capabilities-2800655059608903620","pod":"test-pod","container":"test-pod","type":"normal","pid":2444819,"comm":"runc:[2:INIT]","cap":21,"capName":"CAP_SYS_ADMIN","verdict":"Allow","mountnsid":4026533142}
2022-09-30T12:03:54.2906846Z         {"node":"arotestingcluster-kmcjg
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n inspektor-gadget -l app.kubernetes.io/name=inspektor-gadget
kubectl get events -n inspektor-gadget --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "Some integration tests report events for other namespace" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary: The runcnotify package uses poll() to monitor the file descriptors (pidfd) of containers to detect when they are removed. A 1000ms timeout is used to make poll() return and update the list of file descriptors to monitor.

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with inspektor-gadget installed or the issue environment reproducible.
